titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Kathryn Elizabeth Yohn memorabilia, 1924-1978.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by RMC Staff, March 2016

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Kathryn Elizabeth Yohn Memorabilia,1924-1978.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2016 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Includes a scrapbook, cancelled checks and a bankbook, photographs, Alpha Omicron Pi sorority initiation materials, clippings, programs, correspondence, items pertaining to women's athletics at Cornell, dance cards, and other papers concerning Yohn's student days at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes a scrapbook, cancelled checks and a bankbook, photographs, Alpha Omicron Pi sorority initiation materials, clippings, programs, correspondence, items pertaining to women's athletics at Cornell, dance cards, and other papers concerning Yohn's student days at Cornell University.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: Alpha Omicron Pi. Epsilon Chapter (Cornell University)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Kathryn Elizabeth Altemeier Yohn. Memorabilia, #37-5-2100. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
